---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or an improvement to an existing one.
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Motivation

<!-- What is the concrete problem this would solve? Who feels the pain
today? Avoid abstractions; cite a real scenario. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- A sketch of the surface that would be added or modified. New
tool, new endpoint, new flag, new docs section, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- One or two paragraphs on the obvious other ways to solve the same
problem and why this one is preferred. -->

## Trade-offs

<!-- What you give up by doing this. Maintenance burden, runtime cost,
new attack surface, new dependency. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Bulleted, falsifiable, written so an outsider could tell whether
the implementation matches the request. -->

-
-
